title: Jade Simian
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Jade Simian''' was a [[Restaurant/Legends|restaurant]] and [[Cantina/Legends|bar]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Camden]], located in the [["Snakes' Den"]] [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]]. The [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Information broker/Legends|informant]] known as "[[Eyes (information broker)|Eyes]]" operated out of the Jade Simian.
